descriptionLong.en: A 1920s-style speakeasy bar with 40 seats at marble tables and a brass bar that wraps around three sides. Bartender Marius (15 years at the London Negroni Bar) mixes the classics and his own seasonally rotating creations. A small-plates menu to accompany them (caviar, oysters, carpaccio). Jazz vinyl spins on Friday nights.

descriptionLong.en: Industrial two-storey gastropub seating 80, with a covered terrace. Smash burgers made from Black Angus beef from a family farm in the Banat, 12 taps pouring rotating Romanian IPAs — Hop Hooligans, Bereta, Ground Zero, Ground Hog. On Saturday nights, local blues plays on the second floor. The kitchen opens at noon, with late-night service until 1 am.

descriptionLong.en: A neighbourhood trattoria with pasta made by hand every day, following the recipe of nonna Carla from Bologna. Parmigiano Reggiano aged 24 months, prosciutto from the Bolognani butchers, San Marzano with protected designation of origin. Weekly specials that follow the market. The wine list focuses on Tuscany and Emilia-Romagna, with a house Sangiovese by the carafe.
descriptionLong.de: Eine Trattoria im Viertel, in der die Pasta täglich von Hand gemacht wird, nach dem Rezept von Nonna Carla aus Bologna. Die Weinkarte konzentriert sich auf die Toskana und die Emilia-Romagna, mit einem hauseigenen Sangiovese in der Karaffe.

descriptionLong.en: A new plant-based fine-dining space with just 32 seats, beside Cișmigiu park. Chef Iulian has returned after 6 years at Eleven Madison Park (New York) and applies classic fine-dining technique exclusively to plant-based ingredients. An almond cream that stands in for béchamel, a porcini stock that plays the role of demi-glace, cashew fermented for 8 weeks. Reservations recommended.
descriptionLong.de: Ein neues pflanzenbasiertes Fine-Dining-Lokal mit nur 32 Plätzen, direkt am Cișmigiu-Park. Chefkoch Iulian ist nach 6 Jahren im Eleven Madison Park (New York) zurückgekehrt und wendet klassische Fine-Dining-Technik ausschließlich auf pflanzliche Zutaten an. Eine Mandelcreme, die die Béchamel ersetzt, ein Steinpilzfond, der die Rolle der Demi-glace übernimmt, 8 Wochen fermentierte Cashews. Reservierung empfohlen.
